signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
No definitive consensus exists on whether Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026, as predictions vary widely from bearish short-term stagnation around $0.14 to highly optimistic yearly highs above $1, with prediction markets assigning only 34.8-37.6% probability to a "Yes" outcome.[1][3][7]

### Current Status (as of early 2026)
DOGE trades around **$0.12-$0.14**, following a pullback from $0.15-$0.16 tests in late 2025, amid neutral momentum and moderate trading volume (~$79 mill
